Blew is air traveling from a high place to a low place.

input.content:
[user]How does a breathe form?
[Ninereeds]A breathe starts as still air waiting outside a living body.
Diaphragm pulls downward and draws outside air into lung space.
Lung air passes oxygen into nearby blood vessels inside the chest.
Blood carries oxygen from the chest to every part of the body.
Breathe is the movement of outside air into a living body.

[user]What happens in a compost?
[Ninereeds]A compost begins as plant scraps piled together in a heap.
Bacteria inside the heap break soft plant parts into smaller pieces.
Fungi grow through the pile and break tougher stem material.
The heap turns into dark crumbly soil over many weeks.
Compost is plant material changed into rich dark soil.
